<!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "http://testng.org/testng-1.0.dtd">
<suite guice-stage="DEVELOPMENT" name="GstSaralPro">
  <listeners>
    <listener class-name="pro.saral.utilities.Reporting"/>
  </listeners>
  <test name="GstSaral Test">
    <parameter name="browser" value="chrome"/>
    <classes>
      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.Employee_Test"/>
      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.Deductee_Test"/>
      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.AChallan_Test"/>

      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.AChallan_Mapping_Test"/>

      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.AEreturn_Test"/>
      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.Deduction_26Q_Test"/>
      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.Import_26Q_Test"/>
      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.Challan_Mapping_26Q_Test"/>
      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.Predict_Default_26Q_Test"/>
      <class name="pro.saral.testCases.Ereturn_26Q_Test"/>
    </classes>
  </test> <!-- GstSaral Test -->
</suite> <!-- GstSaralPro -->
